CurrentSeason.description: The current active season for this competition/league

Teams.description: The list of active teams associated with this competition

Games.description: The complete schedule for the current season of this competition/league

CompetitionId.description: The unique ID of the competition/league

AreaId.description: The unique ID of the area where this competition/league is played

AreaName.description: The display name of the area where this competition/league is played

Name.description: The display name of the competition/league

Gender.description: The gender of the players on the team Possible Values: Male; Female

Type.description: The type of this competition/league Possible values: Club; International

Format.description: The format of the competition/league.  Possible values: Domestic League; International Cup

Seasons.description: The seasons associated with this competition/league

Key.description: The unique string key of the competition/league
